details.reasoning: The implementation successfully meets all rubric requirements: (1) export_to_onnx function created that collects and exports LoRA A and B matrices, (2) accepts output_dir and opset_version parameter with default of 17, (3) saves comprehensive metadata including rank, lora_alpha, scaling, target_modules, and per-layer details to adapter_metadata.json, (4) function is properly exposed via __all__ and bound to model class through patch_saving_functions() with both standalone and method wrapper variants, (5) correctly uses torch.onnx.export with proper configuration, (6) follows unsloth patterns including @torch.inference_mode decorator, type hints, validation, and integration with patch_saving_functions. Comprehensive test coverage validates all functionality. Minor issue: PLAN.md file is empty (appears to be leftover from planning phase), but this doesn't affect implementation quality.
